info.name: MoodWave API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the MoodWave backend API.

request.description: Creates a new user account and sends an email verification code.
Authenticates a user and stores returned tokens in the active Postman environment.
Uses the saved refresh token to request a fresh access token pair.
Confirms the six-digit verification code that was sent after registration.
Requests a new verification code for an unverified account.
Starts the password reset flow by emailing a reset code.
Validates the reset code and returns a reset token.
Sets a new password using the short-lived reset token.
Authenticates via Google ID token. Returns tokens + user (creates account on first sign-in).
Authenticates via Apple identity token. Returns tokens + user (creates account on first sign-in).
Authenticates via Firebase phone auth token. Pass the Firebase ID token obtained after SMS verification.
Returns the current verification code for testing. Only works when APP_ENV=development.
Checks whether a username is available before registration.
Returns the authenticated user's full profile with genres and moods.
Updates editable profile fields for the current user.

body.raw:
{
  "first_name": "Test",
  "display_name": "Test User",
  "bio": "I love late-night playlists.",
  "city": "Astana",
  "is_public": true,
  "show_activity": true
}

request.description: Stores onboarding genre selections for the current user.
Stores onboarding mood selections for the current user.
Stores the current device FCM token used for push notifications.
Returns current listening and friend stats for the authenticated user.
Fetches another user's public profile when visible to the requester.
Deletes the authenticated account and clears linked data.
Returns unread and recent notifications for the current user.
Searches tracks, users, and playlists in one request.
Searches tracks through the dedicated music search endpoint.
Searches public users through the search router.
Searches public users through the profile router endpoint.
Searches public playlists using the search router endpoint.
Searches public playlists using the playlist router endpoint.
Returns trending search terms tracked in Redis.
Returns personalized track recommendations with optional mood filtering.
Records a play event and updates the current user's taste data.
Records a like or dislike event for the specified track.
Records a skip event for the specified track.
Returns track charts, optionally filtered by genre.
Returns playlists that belong to the current user or are shared with them.
Creates a new playlist for the current user.
Returns metadata and track entries for a specific playlist.
Updates playlist metadata for a playlist owned by the current user.
Adds a track to the selected playlist.
Removes a track from the selected playlist.
Adds a collaborator to the selected playlist.
Deletes the selected playlist.
Returns the most-played tracks for a city in the last 24 hours.
Returns the current user's taste vector with top genres and artists.
Returns current weather conditions, mood tag, and listener count for the specified city.
Returns three playlists chosen for the current weather conditions in the specified city.
Returns paginated match candidates scored by taste similarity.
Returns match candidates for the verified user.
Likes a candidate and stores match_id when a mutual match is created.
Skips a candidate and hides them temporarily from future results.
Returns mutual matches for the current verified user.
Returns the raw taste vector used by the match engine.
Send a like or skip decision for a candidate.
Returns match chats with partner details and Firebase chat IDs.
Returns recent Firebase-backed messages for a match chat.
Sends a text message in the specified match chat.
Sends a track share message in the specified match chat.
Adds an emoji reaction to a chat message.
Returns accepted friends for the current user.
Returns accepted friends and their current now-playing state when visible.
Creates a pending friend request for the target user.
Accepts a pending friend request from the specified user.
Removes the friendship relationship with the target user.
Blocks the target user and invalidates affected caches.
Submits a moderation report for the target user.
Creates a listening room for the authenticated host and returns WebSocket connection details.
Returns active public listening rooms.
Returns details for a specific active listening room.
Requests approval to join the selected room.
Approves a pending join request for the selected room.
Declines a pending join request for the selected room.
Closes the selected room as the host.
Returns aggregate platform statistics (users, matches, tracks, rooms).
Returns server environment, uptime, and service health.
Clears all Redis caches (admin only).
Returns paginated list of all users with status.
Returns full profile and history for a specific user.
Permanently deletes a user account.
Grants or revokes admin role.
Blocks or unblocks a user.
Returns listening history for a specific user.
Returns platform-wide analytics (DAU, top tracks, genres).
Returns all matches with user pairs and status.
Deletes a specific match by ID.
Returns all rooms with participant counts.
Force-closes a listening room.
Returns all playlists with owner info.
Returns tracks for a specific playlist.
Deletes a playlist.
Returns most-played tracks across the platform.
Removes a track from the platform history.
Returns open user moderation reports.
Resolves and removes a moderation report.
Creates a demo match for the current user. Development only.
Checks API, database, Redis, and Firebase health.
